sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 75.8g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for nuts, fat quality has to justify the calorie density.
sections.subtitleText: 75.8g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for nuts, fat quality has to justify the calorie density.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 13.8g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for a nut, you need enough upside to make the density worth it.
sections.subtitleText: 13.8g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for a nut, you need enough upside to make the density worth it.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 7.9g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is support here, not the whole argument.
sections.subtitleText: 7.9g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is support here, not the whole argument.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: everything else is kind of whatever.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 31% daily value, zinc at 13% daily value, iron at 20% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 31% daily value, zinc at 13% daily value, iron at 20% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: portable, practical snack food because nuts score real points in life because they are easy to use. fat and texture help satiety because they can hold up better than many snack foods. still a recognisable whole-food option because that keeps them cleaner than most processed snacks.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: calorie density is very high because that makes portion control a real issue. protein is useful but not elite because nuts help, but they are not protein stars. cost or allergy issues can limit use because practical downsides still count.

closing.summary: Macadamia Nuts does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the calories stay under control.
